chunks.title: The Woman's Longing for Intimacy
chunks.reason: A continuous speech expressing the woman's desire to be with her beloved in a familiar setting.

chunks.title: The Oath and Description of Love
chunks.reason: A speech containing an oath to the daughters of Jerusalem followed by a poetic description of love's power.

chunks.title: The Brothers and the Sister
chunks.reason: A dialogue between the woman's brothers regarding their sister's future and her response to them.

chunks.title: The Vineyard Comparison
chunks.reason: A dialogue where the woman compares Solomon's vineyard to her own relationship.

chunks.title: The Call and Response
chunks.reason: A brief exchange where the woman calls to her beloved and he responds with an invitation.
